Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Compliance With Deposition Notice And Request For Production Of Documents Of Plaintiff William Lopez And For Award Of Fees And Expenses Incurred; Declaration Of Gina A. Haran In Support Of Pierce Enterprises Motion; And Declaration Of Gina A. Haran In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gina Haran for defendant and moving party: Pierce Enterprises

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Pierce Enterprises' motion to compel compliance with deposition notice and production of documents is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for deposition on a date mutually convenient to the parties. The deposition shall be conducted telephonically and be completed on or before September 22, 2006. The deposition shall be limited to questions relating to product identification and shall not exceed two hours. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
